title: kyllinga nervosa var. flava
intro: Kyllinga nervosa var. flava, also known as Yellow Torvai, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Kyllinga nervosa var. flava include reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, and it is often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
